message:
fix(guard): add 1MB file-size limit for reservation JSON in archive scanner and fix Python test fixture booleans

- Defend against OOM from oversized files in pre-commit archive scan
  by skipping entries exceeding 1MB.
- Fix Python test fixture booleans: False/True -> false/true (matching
  the language the inline tests actually execute in).
- Fix borrow in test: pass reference to join result instead of moving.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
